ownership.std: Additive Ruby target Haxe APIs, externs, facades, and cross-owned surfaces that do not replace upstream std modules.
ownership.std/_std: Upstream Haxe std overrides that must take classpath precedence for Ruby builds.
ownership.runtime/hxruby: Ruby runtime files copied or required by generated output.

entries.reason: Shared core helpers required by generated Ruby output.
Move the compiler-emitted HxException wrapper into the shared runtime.
Move enum ADT compatibility shim out of per-enum generated files.
Basic conversions, stringification, and target helpers.
print/println, args, environment, cwd, command, and process exit behavior.
Ruby-backed string operations needed by common Haxe code.
Ruby array methods and Haxe Array API parity.
Iterator and collection helpers for source-level Haxe code.
Typed Date surface for Ruby time/date lowering.
Typed regular expression surface for Ruby Regexp lowering.
Typed Ruby symbol surface for native interop calls.
Typed Kernel externs for direct Ruby interop.
Target-local Ruby Hash operations used by Haxe map overrides.
Target-local iterator wrapper for Ruby arrays returned by std collection helpers.
Top-level ActiveRecord marker module plus typed column options, association, and validation marker surfaces.
Typed ActiveRecord base surface for Rails model classes.
Typed ActiveRecord model field reference that lets RailsHx forms, params, and order expressions share one checked field source while lowering to Rails-native names/symbols.
Typed ActiveRecord order token produced from field refs and lowered by the compiler into Rails-native order(column: :direction) arguments.
Typed ActiveRecord association token generated from model metadata and lowered by the compiler into Rails-native includes(:association) and joins(:association) arguments.
Typed ActiveRecord::Relation facade for model query chains such as where/includes/joins/order/limit/find/findBy/exists/count/first/toArray.
Typed Rails params/form scope key generated from model metadata so strong params can validate field refs against the intended ActiveRecord model.

Build macro for railsModel/railsColumn/association metadata validation, generated typed field refs, association refs, model params keys, typed where/findBy/exists criteria, typed primary-key find, and typed create/relation/count stubs.
Top-level ActionController marker module for Rails interop.
Typed ActionController base, render, redirect, and params access helpers.
Typed Rails params wrapper for require/permit flows.
Typed strong-params permit entry lowered to Rails symbols and nested permit hashes.
Typed extern facade over Rails request objects for request_method/path/fullpath/format/xhr access.
Typed extern facade over Rails response objects for status and media_type access.
Typed controller facade for Rails flash/session/cookies get/set/delete calls lowered into Rails-native bracket/delete access.
Typed Rails response status tokens lowered to Rails-native symbols for controller response helpers.
Top-level ActionMailer marker module for Rails interop.
Typed ActionMailer base surface for Rails mailer classes, including Rails-native render and mail helpers.
Typed ActionMailer format block facade for multipart html/text mail rendering.
Typed mail kwargs surface for common ActionMailer mail options lowered to Rails-native keyword args.
Macro expansion for typed ActionMailer template locals into Rails-native mail format render blocks.
Top-level ActiveJob marker module for Rails interop.
Typed ActiveJob base surface for Rails job classes.
Build macro for railsJob classes that injects typed performLater/performNow enqueue helpers from the perform signature.
Typed top-level ActionCable facade for Rails-native server broadcasts.
Typed ActionCable channel base surface for railsChannel classes, subscription params, streams, transmit, reject, and stream cleanup helpers.
Typed Haxe JavaScript facade for Rails ActionCable consumer creation and subscriptions.
Typed stream name wrapper carrying the broadcast payload shape for ActionCable stream_from and server broadcasts.
Typed subscription parameter key wrapper lowered to Rails params access in generated channels.
Typed structural facade for ActionCable client subscription handles.
Typed callback shape for Haxe-authored ActionCable client subscriptions.
Build macro for railsChannel classes that enforces the initial subscribed() channel contract.
Top-level ActiveStorage marker module plus one/many attachment typedefs for Rails model metadata.
Typed single ActiveStorage attachment ref with attached/attach/purge helper surface lowered to Rails receiver calls.
Typed many ActiveStorage attachment ref with attached/attach/purge helper surface lowered to Rails receiver calls.
Typed ActionView template marker used to bind Rails template paths to Haxe locals types, including class-backed RailsHx-owned refs and checked external ERB refs.
Typed RailsHx component token binding a Rails partial/template path and slot name to a Haxe locals contract while lowering to ActionView capture plus render partial.
Compile-time ActionView attribute AST lowered by @:railsTemplateAst into Rails ERB.
Lower-level macro helper facade that expands explicit typed template calls, loops, attrs, typed partial renders, route-helper links, and form helpers into HtmlNode/HtmlAttr AST constructors.
Compile-time ActionView node AST for typed Haxe template expressions, loops, partial composition, helper links, and form builders lowered into Rails ERB.
Typed RailsHx component slot marker for captured ActionView buffers passed as typed partial locals.
Typed Haxe facade over Turbo lifecycle events, visit actions/options, frame helpers, and stream-message rendering for RailsHx client-side JavaScript.
Typed DOM target token for server-side Rails Turbo stream helper calls.
Typed server-side Turbo stream name carrying the broadcast payload/locals shape.
Typed server-side Turbo stream facade lowered to Rails turbo_stream helpers and Turbo::StreamsChannel broadcast helpers.
Typed Turbo lifecycle event names used by RailsHx Haxe-authored JavaScript instead of app-level string literals.
Typed Turbo.visit action tokens for advance/replace/restore navigation.
Typed Turbo.visit options for action, frame, and stream-response behavior.
Typed detail payload for Turbo visit lifecycle events.
Typed detail payload for Turbo render lifecycle events.
Typed detail payload for Turbo before-fetch-request hooks while preserving dynamic browser fetch options.
Typed detail payload for Turbo before-fetch-response hooks while preserving dynamic Turbo fetch response objects.
Typed turbo-frame loading tokens for eager/lazy frame behavior.
Typed turbo-frame target tokens such as _top for RailsHx client-side frame helpers.
Typed detail payload for Turbo frame render hooks.
Typed Turbo stream action tokens for append/prepend/replace/update/remove and related stream operations.
Typed detail payload for Turbo before-stream-render hooks.
Typed structural view of Turbo form submission details exposed to submit lifecycle handlers.
Typed structural event for Turbo submit-start and submit-end handlers.
Generic typed Turbo event shape for event detail payloads and preventDefault support.
Marker base for Haxe-authored Rails migration classes lowered into ActiveRecord migration files.
Typed RailsHx migration operation DSL for alter/drop/index/foreign-key/reversible ActiveRecord migration statements.
Macro expansion for require/permit params with typed model key and field-ref validation before emitting snake_case Ruby keys.
Macro expansion for typed ActionView template locals into Rails-native render options.
Typed ActiveSupport Object#blank?, Object#present?, and Object#presence receiver extension facade using @:rubyPatch and Haxe using.
Typed ActiveSupport String#squish receiver extension facade using @:rubyPatch and Haxe using.
Typed ActiveSupport::Notifications event-name token carrying the payload shape while lowering to Rails string event names.
Typed ActiveSupport notification event facade exposing typed payloads plus Rails event metadata such as name, duration, and allocations.
Typed ActiveSupport::Notifications publish/subscribe facade for checked event names and payloads.
Typed subscription handle returned by ActiveSupport::Notifications subscribe helpers and accepted by unsubscribe.
Map Haxe Math API to Ruby Math and numeric behavior.
Dynamic field access and method calls for Ruby objects.
Runtime class and enum reflection for generated Ruby values.
Use Ruby JSON runtime while preserving Haxe API.
Ruby Hash-backed map with Haxe StringMap behavior.
Ruby Hash-backed map with integer key behavior.
Object identity map semantics for Ruby.
Byte storage and encoding behavior backed by Ruby strings or byte arrays.
Filesystem primitives backed by Ruby File, Dir, and FileUtils.
File read/write APIs backed by Ruby IO.
